            Animation Lab
            
    
              
    Build motion as a guided package instead of assembling animation shorthand by hand. Use this lab to choose a keyframe, trigger, timing, then either preview it in Step 2 or add it directly to the CSS Builder.
    
              
    
                
    
                  
                  
                
    
                
    
                  
                  
                  
                  
    When enabled, Step 2 state and Animation Lab trigger stay matched for shared interaction states.
    
                  
    
                    
    Trigger Sync Console
    
                    
    
                      
    
                        
    Step 2 Rule
    
                        
    Always On
    
                      
    
                      
    
                        
    Animation Lab
    
                        
    Always On
    
                      
    
                      
    
                        
    Preview Simulator
    
                        
    Always On
    
                      
    
                      
    
                        
    Actual Preview
    
                        
    Idle / Always On
    
                      
    
                      
    
                        
    Alignment Status
    
                        
    All three surfaces start aligned on Always On.
    
                      
    
                      
    
                        
    Last Trigger Change
    
                        
    Initial load. Shared trigger state not edited yet.
    
                      
    
                      
    
                        
    Suggested Fix
    
                        
    Already aligned. No action needed.
    
                      
    
                    
    
                    
    
                      
                      
    
                        
                        
                      
    
                      
    Pick a shared state here when you want to reset all three surfaces deliberately instead of aligning to whichever panel is currently correct.
    
                    
    
                    
    
                      
                      
                      
                      
                      
                    
    
                    
    
                      
                      
    When enabled, the preview simulator mirrors the active preview target whenever one live state is active.
    
                    
    
                  
    
                
    
              
    
              
    
                
    
                  
                  
                
    
                
    
                  
                  
                
    
              
    
              
    
                
    
                  
                  
                
    
                
    
                  
                  
                
    
              
    
              
    
                
    
                  
                  
                
    
                
    
                  
                  
                
    
              
    
              
    
                
    
                  
                  
                
    
                
    
                  
                  
                
    
              
    
              
    
                
                
                
                
              
    
              
    
                
    How To Read This Motion
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
    
                      
    
                        
    Mini Motion Stage
    
                        
    The lab replays this motion here first, so you can inspect it before loading it into Step 2.
    
                      
    
                      Auto Preview: Always On
                    
    
                    
    
                      
    
                        
    
                        
    
                          Target Object
                          The target object inside this demo card mirrors the current lab settings.
                        
    
                        
    
                          Demo
                        
    
                      
    
                    
    
                    
    
                      
    
                        
                        
                      
    
                      
                      
    
                        
    
                          
                          
    Turn on Frame Inspect to freeze the mini stage at a specific checkpoint in the first pass.
    
                        
    
                        
                      
    
                    
    
                    
    
                      
    
                        
    
                        
    
                        
    
                      
    
                      
    The rail will break the first visible cycle into delay, active motion, and any held end state.
    
                    
    
                    
    
                      
    
                        
    Cycle Budget
    
                        
    The first visible cycle timing will be summarized here.
    
                      
    
                      
    
                        
    Release Risk
    
                        
    Risk level will mirror the current motion package here.
    
                      
    
                      
    
                        
    Best Surface
    
                        
    Surface fit guidance will appear here once the lab scores the preview targets.
    
                      
    
                      
    
                        
    Frame Checkpoint
    
                        
    Live replay is active. Turn on Frame Inspect to freeze a checkpoint.
    
                      
    
                      
    
                        
    Visible Cue
    
                        
    The lab will explain what the frozen frame means once you start scrubbing.
    
                      
    
                    
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    
                      
    
                        
    What It Does
    
                        
    Choose a motion pack to see the current animation explained in plain language.
    
                      
    
                      
    
                        
    When It Starts
    
                        
    Delay and trigger timing will be translated into a practical start cue here.
    
                      
    
                      
    
                        
    How It Settles
    
                        
    Iterations, direction, and fill mode will be summarized here.
    
                      
    
                      
    
                        
    Before Step 2
    
                        
    Use the mini stage first, then send the motion to Step 2 once the movement feels intentional.
    
                      
    
                    
    
                  
    
                
    
              
    
              
    
                
    Stage Checkpoint Bank
    
                
    Save named rehearsal frames from Frame Inspect, reload them later, or send them straight into the compare bench so motion reviews keep a stable visual checkpoint.
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
    Saved Frames
    
                    
    No stage checkpoints saved yet.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Compare Route
    
                    
    Candidate Shelf is the current compare destination.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Live Frame
    
                    
    Turn on Frame Inspect to tag compare captures with a frozen rehearsal frame.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Coverage
    
                    
    0 / 3 stage checkpoints saved. Capture the defaults to cover the full first pass.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Replay Plan
    
                    
    Auto Fill will save the default start, peak, and settle frames so the whole motion arc is documented in one step.
    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
                  
    
                    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
                  
                  
                
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
    Start Cue
    
                    
    Empty. Save the opening frame or the earliest waiting checkpoint.
    
                    
    Best for confirming delay timing, immediate feedback, and whether the first visible frame starts soon enough.
    
                    
    
                      
                      
                      
                      
                    
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Motion Peak
    
                    
    Empty. Save the most revealing in-motion checkpoint.
    
                    
    Best for preserving the clearest moving frame before you compare variants or promote a keeper.
    
                    
    
                      
                      
                      
                      
                    
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Settle Pose
    
                    
    Empty. Save the held end pose or final cycle edge.
    
                    
    Best for checking fill mode, end-state polish, and whether the motion lands cleanly before export.
    
                    
    
                      
                      
                      
                      
                    
    
                  
    
                
    
              
    
              
    
                
    Motion Pack Brief
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
    Preset Intent
    
                    
    Choose a motion pack to see what job it is designed to do.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Best For
    
                    
    Recommended surfaces and interaction moments will appear here.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Watch Out
    
                    
    Each motion pack includes a guardrail so it stays intentional in production.
    
                  
    
                
    
              
    
              
    
                
    Preset Drift Tracker
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
    Baseline Status
    
                    
    The selected motion pack is currently unchanged.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Drift Score
    
                    
    0 / 100 (Locked)
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Biggest Drift
    
                    
    Any differences from the motion pack will be called out here.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Reset Plan
    
                    
    Use the targeted restore actions to bring the package back toward its preset baseline.
    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
                  
                  
                
    
                
    The tracker compares the current controls to the selected motion pack so you can reset intentionally instead of reloading the whole lab by accident.
    
              
    
              
    
                
    Motion Compare Bench
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
    Baseline Anchor
    
                    
    Empty. Capture the version you want to protect.
    
                    
    Use this slot as the release anchor so later variants are measured against one stable motion package.
    
                    
    
                      
                      
                      
                    
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Candidate Shelf
    
                    
    Empty. Save the most promising alternate.
    
                    
    Use this to hold the best-looking refinement while you keep testing risk, trigger fit, and surface behavior.
    
                    
    
                      
                      
                      
                    
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Stress Test
    
                    
    Empty. Use this slot for a riskier option.
    
                    
    Capture the heaviest or most experimental version here so you can compare ambition against launch safety.
    
                    
    
                      
                      
                      
                    
    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
    Recommended Keeper
    
                    
    Capture at least one slot to start ranking motion candidates.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Baseline Delta
    
                    
    Once you have a baseline and another slot, the bench will summarize the strongest change and release impact.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Next Compare Move
    
                    
    Use the slots to preserve alternatives before you overwrite the live controls.
    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
    Protected Anchor
    
                    
    No dedicated baseline anchor is locked yet.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Release Candidate
    
                    
    The bench will nominate a keeper once you capture a motion package.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Promotion Plan
    
                    
    Save at least one slot, then promote the best keeper when you are ready to protect it.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Export Focus
    
                    
    The handoff panel will call out whether the live controls already match the best saved package.
    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
                  
                  
                  
                
    
                
    Capture a baseline, a likely keeper, and a stress-test variant so motion decisions stay deliberate instead of living only in the current form fields.
    
              
    
              
    
                
    Rehearsal Runbook
    
                
    Turn the saved compare bench, the forge branches, or the checkpoint arc into a repeatable walkthrough so you can replay validation in the same order before handoff.
    
                
    
                  
                  
                
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
    Coverage
    
                    
    Choose a source to build a repeatable review route.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Queued Step
    
                    
    No rehearsal step is queued yet.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Step Position
    
                    
    0 / 0 | No route
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Handoff Readiness
    
                    
    The runbook will call out when the route is strong enough to export.
    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
    Next Move
    
                    
    Save or generate at least one motion route to start rehearsing.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Autoplay Pace
    
                    
    Manual stepping is active until you start an autoplay pass.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Route Progress
    
                    
    No runbook step has been loaded yet.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Pass Counter
    
                    
    0 completed passes. Start an autoplay pass when the route is ready.
    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
                  
    
                    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
                  
                  
                  
                  
                  
                  
                
    
                
    Use this runbook to replay the same validation sequence instead of rebuilding the order from memory before every export pass. Autoplay can now walk the saved route at a fixed pace for hands-free review.
    
              
    
              
    
                
    Motion Session Vault
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
    Saved Status
    
                    
    No autosaved lab session yet.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Saved Contents
    
                    
    Current motion draft, sequence plan, and compare slots will be summarized here once a session is stored.
    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
                  
                  
                
    
                
    The lab auto-saves the current motion draft, sequence planner, and compare bench so you can leave and resume without rebuilding the same experiment.
    
              
    
              
    
                
    Motion Variant Forge
    
                
    Spin the current draft into calmer, launch-ready, or showcase-weight variants without manually retuning every timing control.
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
    Quiet QA
    
                    
    A low-risk testing variant will appear here once the lab has a motion draft.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Launch Default
    
                    
    The ship-ready tuned variant will appear here once the lab has a motion draft.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Showcase Push
    
                    
    A more expressive comparison variant will appear here once the lab has a motion draft.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Forge Recommendation
    
                    
    The forge will recommend which variant to test next after it compares risk and target fit.
    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
    Bench Route
    
                    
    Quiet QA, Launch Default, and Showcase Push can branch into the compare bench without replacing the live draft.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Live Match
    
                    
    The forge will call out which branch already matches the live draft.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Recommended Slot
    
                    
    The forge will suggest which compare slot should receive the next promoted branch.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Bench Action
    
                    
    Bulk benching will save all three forge branches into compare slots in one pass.
    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
                  
                  
                  
                
    
                
    
                  
                  
                  
                
    
                
    Use the forge to jump between a safer QA draft, a tuned default, and a higher-drama comparison pass before you overwrite compare slots.
    
              
    
              
    
                
    Motion Launch Gate
    
                
    Roll the keeper bench, review matrix, checkpoints, and forge into one launch decision so the lab can tell you what to load, what to rehearse, and what still blocks release.
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
    Gate Status
    
                    
    The launch gate will summarize the current release posture here.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Primary Source
    
                    
    A release source recommendation appears after the lab scores the current motion draft.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Route Readiness
    
                    
    The gate will show how complete the current rehearsal path is before export.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Immediate Focus
    
                    
    The next safe action will appear here once the lab has enough evidence.
    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
                  
                  
                
    
                
    The launch gate chooses the highest-value safe next move from the current lab evidence instead of making you cross-check each motion panel manually.
    
              
    
              
    
                
                
    The lab will target your current builder selector.
    
              
    
              
    
                
                
    
              
    
              
    
                
                
    
              
    
              
    
                
    Custom Keyframe Draft
    
                
    Override the selected built-in keyframe with a named draft for live preview and export while keeping the chosen built-in motion pack as the coaching baseline.
    
                
    
                  
                  
    Custom keyframe drafting is off. Turn it on to preview and export a bespoke motion block.
    
                
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
                    
    
                      
                      
                    
    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
                  
                
    
                
    
                  
    
                    Structured Stop Editor
                    
    The current draft will be parsed into editable stops here.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    
                      
                      
                    
    
                    
    
                      
                      
    
                        
                        
                      
    
                    
    
                  
    
                  
    Templates preload common motion anchors, and Normalize Parsed Stops rewrites recoverable blocks back into the lab's canonical layout.
    
                  
    
                    
    
                      
                      
                    
    
                    
    
                      
                      
                    
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                    
                    
                  
    
                  
    Use this when the draft is easier to tune stop-by-stop than as raw text. The textarea above still stays in sync, so you can switch between structured edits and freeform edits at any time.
    
                
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
    Draft Coverage
    
                    
    The lab will summarize how fully the draft covers the first and last visible frame.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Marker Health
    
                    
    Duplicate or unusual markers will be called out here before export.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Property Span
    
                    
    The lab will list which CSS properties the custom draft is actually moving.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Edge Continuity
    
                    
    The lab will confirm whether every moving property is anchored in both the first and last visible frames.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Stop Hygiene
    
                    
    Repeated properties inside one stop will be flagged here before export.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Repair Plan
    
                    
    Use the recovery actions when the draft is missing edge frames or repeats the same marker more than once.
    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
                  
                  
                  
                
    
                
    These repair actions only reshape the custom draft textarea. They do not change the built-in motion pack you are using as the intent baseline.
    
                
    The selected built-in keyframe still powers the Motion Pack brief and guardrails. The custom draft only overrides the live preview, exported keyframes block, and shipped animation name while enabled.
    
              
    
              
    
                
    Keyframe Anatomy
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
    Frame Markers
    
                    
    Choose a built-in keyframe to inspect its timeline markers.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Animated Properties
    
                    
    The lab will summarize which CSS properties are moving in this keyframe.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Motion Family
    
                    
    A reusable motion family label will appear here.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Shipping Watchpoint
    
                    
    The lab will call out the main thing to verify before reusing this motion.
    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
                
    
                
    Use this to inspect the built-in motion path before you tune duration, loops, or trigger behavior.
    
              
    
              
    
                
    Motion Guidance
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
    Intensity
    
                    
    Balanced motion ready for reuse.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Trigger Fit
    
                    
    Choose a trigger to decide when the motion should start.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Reduced Motion
    
                    
    A calmer fallback recommendation will appear here.
    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
                  
    Turn this on to force the current preview target into the calmer fallback without editing your saved CSS.
    
                
    
                
    
                  
                  
    
                    
                    
    The lab will suggest a safer motion adjustment when the current setup is risky.
    
                  
    
                
    
              
    
              
    
                
    Motion Intent Coach
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
    Recommended Lane
    
                    
    The lab will map this motion to a rollout lane once timing and trigger are set.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Target Cadence
    
                    
    Choose a trigger and timing to see the recommended motion budget.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Why This Lane
    
                    
    The coach will explain what user moment your current settings resemble.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Suggested Adjustment
    
                    
    A one-click tuning recommendation will appear here when the current motion drifts outside its intended job.
    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
                  
    
                    
                    
    Use this when you want the lab to rebalance timing, loops, and delay for the current motion lane.
    
                  
    
                
    
              
    
              
    
                
    Motion Rollout Planner
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
    Active Window
    
                    
    Choose timing values to estimate how long this motion stays active.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    First Movement
    
                    
    The planner will explain when the first visible frame starts.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Settle Behavior
    
                    
    Fill mode and direction decide what remains after the motion ends.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    QA Prompt
    
                    
    A quick validation prompt will appear here for the current trigger.
    
                  
    
                
    
              
    
              
    
                
    Rapid Trigger Stress Test
    
                
    Pressure-test the current motion against repeated user input before you ship it. This simulates a quick burst of the same interaction so you can spot overlap, backlog, and delayed feedback early.
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
    Burst Window
    
                    
    The lab will estimate how long a rapid interaction burst stays visibly active.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Overlap Risk
    
                    
    Choose a burst pattern to see whether new triggers stack on top of the current cycle.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Recovery Cue
    
                    
    The lab will explain when the surface fully settles after the final repeated trigger.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Release Decision
    
                    
    A shipping recommendation will appear here once the burst route is scored.
    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
                
    
                
    Use this when a hover, press, or repeated focus path might retrigger before the current cycle has finished.
    
              
    
              
    
                
    Timing Ladder
    
                
    Test three tempo tiers for the current motion without rebuilding the rest of the package. Each tier rewrites duration, delay, and easing together so timing stays coherent while the trigger, keyframes, and behavior remain intact.
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
    Fast Response
    
                    
    Immediate timing guidance will appear here.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Balanced Response
    
                    
    Balanced timing guidance will appear here.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Expressive Pass
    
                    
    A longer timing pass will appear here.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Recommended Tier
    
                    
    The ladder will nominate the safest timing tier for the current trigger and surface.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Operator Note
    
                    
    The ladder will explain what to validate before you promote a new timing tier.
    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
                  
                  
                  
                
    
              
    
              
    
                
    Motion Execution Map
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
    Sequence Markers
    
                    
    The lab will map the motion from trigger to settle once timing is configured.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Operator Checklist
    
                    
    A concise review pass will appear here so the motion can be tested consistently.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Exit Condition
    
                    
    The lab will explain what the user should see after the motion finishes.
    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
                  
                
    
                
    The exported package combines keyframes, the active selector rule, and the reduced-motion fallback.
    
              
    
              
    
                
    Release Readiness
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
    Motion Risk Score
    
                    
    0 / 100 (Low)
    
                    
    
                      
    
                    
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Launch Recommendation
    
                    
    A shipping recommendation will appear here as you tune the motion package.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Validation Focus
    
                    
    The lab will call out the riskiest part of the current setup so QA stays targeted.
    
                  
    
                
    
              
    
              
    
                
    Multi-State Review
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
    Primary Path
    
                    
    The live motion path will be summarized here once the lab has enough timing data.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Reduced Path
    
                    
    The reduced-motion fallback review will appear here.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Best Review State
    
                    
    The lab will score alternate trigger states for this preview target.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Review Verdict
    
                    
    A rollout recommendation will appear here after the live and reduced paths are compared.
    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
    Next Review Move
    
                    
    The review matrix will suggest whether to rehearse the best state, switch the live trigger, or retune the motion.
    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
                  
                  
                
    
                
    Use this review to compare the live path, reduced-motion fallback, and alternate trigger states before you export.
    
              
    
              
    
                
    Release Handoff Brief
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
    Keeper Status
    
                    
    Capture a compare slot to lock a recommended keeper before you export a handoff brief.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Trigger Decision
    
                    
    The review matrix will translate the strongest trigger state into a release recommendation here.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Surface Plan
    
                    
    Surface-fit guidance will be condensed into a one-line release plan here.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Export Next Step
    
                    
    Once the lab has a keeper, this panel will call out the final action before you export.
    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
    Bundle Source
    
                    
    The bundle will call out whether it is packaging a saved keeper or the current live draft.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Included Payload
    
                    
    Release brief, shipping CSS, reduced-motion fallback, and sequence coverage will be summarized here.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Bundle Readiness
    
                    
    Save a compare slot to turn the bundle into a keeper-backed handoff packet.
    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
                  
                
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
    Primary Packet
    
                    
    The rollout packet will nominate a primary release route once the compare bench has a keeper.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Fallback Packet
    
                    
    Save a second compare slot to turn the rollout packet into a keeper-vs-alternate QA handoff.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    QA Delta
    
                    
    Release, risk, and trigger deltas between the primary and fallback packets will be called out here.
    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
                  
                  
                
    
                
    This brief combines the compare keeper, review matrix, and surface-fit guidance into one reusable export block.
    
              
    
              
    
                
    Surface Fit Guide
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
    Current Target Fit
    
                    
    The lab will score the active preview target after you choose a motion pack.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Best Match
    
                    
    A stronger surface recommendation will appear here when the current target is a weak fit.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Shipping Caution
    
                    
    The guide will flag when the current motion is too heavy for dense Form.io controls.
    
                  
    
                
    
                
    Top recommended surfaces will appear here once the lab scores the motion against the preview targets.
    
                
    
                  
                  
                
    
                
    Use these actions to move the preview toward the strongest-fit surface before you ship the motion.
    
              
    
              
    
                
    Motion Sequence Planner
    
                
    Turn the current motion package into a coordinated stagger plan when repeated siblings should react in order instead of all firing at once.
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                  
    Sequence presets translate common stagger jobs into tuned step, gap, and order defaults.
    
                
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
    Pattern Summary
    
                    
    Configure a sequence to see how the motion spreads across repeated siblings.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Total Window
    
                    
    The planner will estimate when the last child settles once a sequence is configured.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Review Focus
    
                    
    The planner will call out the main thing to validate before you ship a staggered motion.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Coach Verdict
    
                    
    The coach will recommend the safest stagger pattern for this motion and preview target.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Guardrail
    
                    
    Sequence guardrails will call out when repeated motion drifts too far from the original user action.
    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
    Sequence Health
    
                    
    Health scoring will explain how tightly the stagger stays coupled to the original trigger.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Cadence Ratio
    
                    
    Cadence ratio compares the stagger gap to the base motion duration.
    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
                  
                  
                
    
                
    Use this planner when stacked rows, helper messages, or repeated fields should move in a deliberate order.
    
              
    
            
    
          
    

          
    
            
            
          
    
          
    
            Custom Declaration Studio
            
    
              
    Use guided controls for common declaration patterns, then load or append the generated draft into the freeform field above.
    
              
    
                
                
              
    
              
    
                
                
    
                  
                  
                
    
                
    Preset guidance updates when you switch declaration type.
    
              
    
              
    
                
    
                  
                  
                
    
                
    
                  
                  
                
    
              
    
              
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
                
    
              
    
              
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Border Intent
    
                    
    Use a single edge for dividers and a full border for chips, cards, and inputs that need clearer containment.
    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
    Border Stroke Coach
    
                  
    
                    
    
                      
    Coverage
    
                      
    Full perimeter border for clear containment.
    
                    
    
                    
    
                      
    Weight
    
                      
    1px reads as a restrained default.
    
                    
    
                    
    
                      
    Guardrail
    
                      
    Keep form field borders subtle enough that focus styles can still take visual priority.
    
                    
    
                  
    
                
    
              
    
              
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
                  
                
    
              
    
              
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
                
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
    Spacing Shorthand Coach
    
                  
    
                    
    
                      
    Output Shape
    
                      
    1-value shorthand
    
                    
    
                    
    
                      
    Value Map
    
                      
    12px applies to all sides.
    
                    
    
                    
    
                      
    Why This Fits
    
                      
    Matching sides collapse to the shortest readable shorthand.
    
                    
    
                  
    
                
    
              
    
              
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                
    
              
    
              
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
    Transition Coach
    
                  
    
                    
    
                      
    Scope Fit
    
                      
    Choose a property to see how targeted or broad this transition is.
    
                    
    
                    
    
                      
    Tempo
    
                      
    Pick duration and delay values to estimate how quickly the change will settle.
    
                    
    
                    
    
                      
    Guardrail
    
                      
    A rollout caution will appear here when the timing or property scope gets risky.
    
                    
    
                  
    
                
    
              
    
              
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Transform Intent
    
                    
    Use this to combine motion axes into one readable transform declaration.
    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                
    
              
    
              
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Clamp Guardrail
    
                    
    Use this when a property should flex across screen sizes without overshooting its safe range.
    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
    Fluid Clamp Coach
    
                  
    
                    
    
                      
    Range
    
                      
    1rem to 2rem
    
                    
    
                    
    
                      
    Viewport Pull
    
                      
    2.5vw adds a moderate scaling curve.
    
                    
    
                    
    
                      
    Why This Fits
    
                      
    Balanced fluid growth keeps the property flexible without overshooting the final cap too early.
    
                    
    
                  
    
                
    
              
    
              
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Text Intent
    
                    
    Use this for labels, helper text, and compact headings that need deliberate rhythm without hand-typing four declarations.
    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
    Text Stack Coach
    
                  
    
                    
    
                      
    Readability
    
                      
    Balanced body rhythm for labels and helper copy.
    
                    
    
                    
    
                      
    Density
    
                      
    A moderate size and line-height keep dense forms readable.
    
                    
    
                    
    
                      
    Guardrail
    
                      
    Keep typographic contrast visible without tightening the line-height so far that stacked fields start to feel cramped.
    
                    
    
                  
    
                
    
              
    
              
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
    Flex Layout Coach
    
                  
    
                    
    
                      
    Flow
    
                      
    A horizontal lane is active for inline actions or compact field groups.
    
                    
    
                    
    
                      
    Gap Load
    
                      
    12px keeps siblings distinct without forcing oversized gutters.
    
                    
    
                    
    
                      
    Guardrail
    
                      
    Use row layouts for short control clusters. Switch to column when content length can grow unpredictably.
    
                    
    
                  
    
                
    
              
    
              
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Surface Intent
    
                    
    Use this when a panel should feel elevated and translucent without hand-building the tint, border, blur, and shadow stack.
    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
    Glass Surface Coach
    
                  
    
                    
    
                      
    Transparency
    
                      
    The surface is translucent enough to feel layered while still preserving text legibility.
    
                    
    
                    
    
                      
    Blur Load
    
                      
    14px blur reads as polished depth for cards and overlay shells.
    
                    
    
                    
    
                      
    Guardrail
    
                      
    Keep glass surfaces restrained on dense forms so decorative chrome does not compete with labels, errors, or focus states.
    
                    
    
                  
    
                
    
              
    
              
    
                
                
    border-radius: 12px;
    
              
    
              
    Use this when you want rounded corners without hand-typing the declaration.
    
              
    
                
                
              
    
            
    
          
    
          
    
            
    
              
              
            
    
            
    
              
              
            
    
          
    
          
    Current rule additions use the selected layer. Example output: @media (max-width: 900px) { ... }.
    
          
    
            
            
          
    
          
    
            
          
    
          
    
            
            
    
          
    
          
    
            
            
          
    
          
    
            Class Packs And Presets
            
    
              
    
                
                
    
                  
                  
                
    
                
    
                  
                  
                
    
                
    
                  
                  
                  
                  
                  
                
    
                
    Cycle off.
    
                
    
              
    
              
    
                
                
    
                  
                  
                
    
                
    
                  
                  
                  
                
    
              
    
            
    
          
    
          
    
            
            
    
          
    
          
    
            Export Wizard
            
    
              
    
                
    Export Wizard
    
                
    Turn the current class into something you can paste into Form.io immediately.
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
                    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
    Form.io HTML Attributes Value
    
                    
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    How To Use This Export
    
                    
    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
                  
                
    
              
    
              
    
                
    Portable Bundle
    
                
    Package the current builder, selector graph, Animation Lab state, export choice, deployment guidance, and audit summary into one portable JSON handoff.
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
    Bundle Scope
    
                    
    The portable bundle will summarize the current export route here.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Included Payload
    
                    
    Builder rules, variables, and export metadata will be counted here.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Rollback Safety
    
                    
    Save at least one rollback checkpoint before importing external bundles.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Handoff Summary
    
                    
    Use this bundle when the receiving browser should recreate your full styling workspace, not just the final snippet.
    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
                  
                  
                
    
                
    Portable bundle export keeps the authored workspace intact so another browser can restore the same selector, preview, and motion context before deployment.
    
              
    
              
    
                
    Import + Rollback Console
    
                
    Paste a portable bundle here to restore a shared workspace. The console auto-captures a safety checkpoint before imports and restores.
    
                
    
                  
    
                    
    Import Status
    
                    
    No bundle imported in this session yet.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Rollback Queue
    
                    
    No rollback checkpoints yet.
    
                  
    
                  
    
                    
    Restore Coverage
    
                    
    A restore will rewind builder rules, variables, selector graph, Animation Lab, preview target, and export format together.
    
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
                  
                
    
                
    
                  
                  
    
                
    
                
    
                  
                  
                  
                  
                
    
                
    The newest checkpoint is always first. Each import or restore captures a fresh safety snapshot before changing the live workspace.
    
              
    
            
    
          
    
          
    
            Form.io Deployment Assistant
            
    
              
    Turn the current export choice into a concrete Form.io placement plan before you paste anything into production.
    
              
    
                
    
                  
    Recommended Path
    
                  
    Choose an export format to see the safest deployment route.
    
                
    
                
    
                  
    Best Mount Point
    
                  
    The best Form.io insertion point will appear here.
    
                
    
                
    
                  
    Scope Check
    
                  
    Selector and wrapper guidance will update from your current builder state.
    
                
    
                
    
                  
    Risk Watch
    
                  
    Unsupported combinations and rollout cautions will be called out here.
    
                
    
              
    
              
    
                
                
      
              
      
              
      
                
                
      
              
      
            
      
          
      
          
      
            Accessibility + Quality Checks
            
      
              
      Run a release-style audit against the current selector, motion package, and export route before you ship.
      
              
      
                
      
                  
      
                    
      Accessibility Readiness
      
                    100 / 100
                  
      
                  
      
                    
      
                  
      
                  
      Audit has not found any release blockers yet.
      
                
      
                
      
                  
      
                    
      Focus Coverage
      
                    
      Focus styling guidance will appear here.
      
                  
      
                  
      
                    
      Motion Safeguard
      
                    
      Motion fallback guidance will appear here.
      
                  
      
                  
      
                    
      Export Confidence
      
                    
      Export-specific rollout guidance will appear here.
      
                  
      
                  
      
                    
      Selector Pressure
      
                    
      Selector complexity guidance will appear here.
      
                  
      
                  
      
                    
      Contrast Check
      
                    
      Live preview contrast guidance will appear here.
      
                  
      
                  
      
                    
      State Coverage
      
                    
      Form-state QA guidance will appear here.
      
                  
      
                
      
              
      
              
      
                
                
      
              
      
              
      
                
                
      
              
      
              
      
                
                
      
              
      
              
      
                
                
      
              
      
              
      
                
                
      
              
      
              
      
                
                
                
                
                
                
              
      
            
      
          
      
          
      
        
      

        
      

        
      
          
      
          
      5) Live Preview
      
          
      Preview target receives current live styles and auto-applied class for fast visual validation.
      
          
      
            
            
          
      
          
      
            
            
            
      If your rule uses Hover, Focus, Active, Disabled, or Checked, switch this dropdown to the same state to preview it.
      
          
      
          
      
            
            
            
      The selected photo feeds both the Image preview and the Card backdrop scene so blur, saturation, and contrast changes are easier to inspect.
      
          
      
          
      
            
            Preview: After
          
      
          
      
            Simulator: Default
            Actual: none
          
      
          
      Active preview target: Card. The highlighted panel receives the current styles.
      

          
      
            
      
              
      
                
      Card
      
                
      
                  
      
                    Glass Card
                    Backdrop-sensitive sample
                  
      
                
      
              
      
              
      
                
      Input
      
                
                
      Caret demo
      
              
      
              
      
                
      Button
      
                
              
      
              
      
                
      Image
      
                
              
      
              
      
                
      Overlap / z-index
      
                
      
                  
      Back z1
      
                  
      Mid z2
      
                  
      Front z3
      
                
      
              
      
              
      
                
      Sandbox (Selectors)
      
                
      
                  
      .box.alpha
      
                  
      .box.beta
      
                  
      .box.gamma
      
                  
                
      
              
      
              
      
                
      Form.io Text Field
      
                
      
                  
                  
                  
      Reusable starter for Form.io text, email, password, and number inputs.
      
                
      
              
      
              
      
                
      Form.io Native Select
      
                
      
                  
                  
                  
      Baseline for native select components using .form-select.
      
                
      
              
      
              
      
                
      Form.io Enhanced Select
      
                
      
                  
      Choices.js shell
      
                  
      
                    
      
                      
      
                        
      Premium support
      
                      
      
                    
      
                    
      
                      
      
                        
      Premium support
      
                        
      Standard
      
                        
      Basic
      
                      
      
                    
      
                  
      
                  
      Use this for enhanced Form.io selects that render through Choices.js.
      
                
      
              
      
              
      
                
      Form.io Textarea
      
                
      
                  
                  
                  
      Starter for multi-line fields, notes, and rich-text wrappers.
      
                
      
              
      
              
      
                
      Form.io Checkbox
      
                
      
                  
      Checkbox group item
      
                  
                  
      Targets the checkbox control inside a standard .form-check row.
      
                
      
              
      
              
      
                
      Form.io Radio
      
                
      
                  
      Radio option
      
                  
                  
      Use when styling radio groups and option states.
      
                
      
              
      
              
      
                
      Form.io Submit Button
      
                
      
                  
      Submit action
      
                  
                  
      Baseline for Form.io button and submit components.
      
                
      
              
      
              
      
                
      Form.io File Dropzone
      
                
      
                  
      File upload
      
                  
      
                    
      Drop files here or browse
      
                  
      
                  
      Starter for drag-and-drop upload styling and browse affordances.
      
                
      
              
      
              
      
                
      Form.io Date / Time
      
                
      
                  
                  
      
                    
                    CAL
                  
      
                  
      Use this for Form.io date/time inputs and their addon trigger.
      
                
      
              
      
              
      
                
      Form.io Tags
      
                
      
                  
      Tagged values
      
                  
                    
      
                      
      
                        
      
                          priority
                          billing
                        
      
                      
      
                    
      
                        
                  
      Starter for tag pickers and token chips inside Form.io tags components.
      
                
      
              
      
              
      
                
      Form.io Selectboxes
      
                
      
                  
      Notification channels
      
                  
                  
                  
      Use this for multi-checkbox selectboxes groups and option labels.
      
                
      
              
      
              
      
                
      Form.io Address
      
                
      
                  
                  
      
                    
                    x
                  
      
                  
      Starter for address autocomplete inputs and the built-in clear icon.
      
                
      
              
      
              
      
                
      Form.io Datagrid
      
                
      
                  
      Line items
      
                  
      
                    
                      
      
                        Item
                        Qty
                        Actions
                      
      
                          
                    
                      
      
                        Subscription
                        2
                        
                          
                        
                      
      
                          
                  
      
                  
      Use this for grid borders, cells, hover rows, and remove controls.
